faqs.question: What is the purpose of this chatbot?
faqs.answer: The chatbot is designed to assist users in finding information quickly and efficiently.

faqs.question: How can I reset my password?
faqs.answer: You can reset your password by clicking on the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page.

faqs.question: Where can I find support?
faqs.answer: Support can be found on our support page, where you can submit tickets and view FAQs.
